title: The Testament of Sister New Devil
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 'BURST' (10, eps 13-22) = 22 total. The series is sourced from Tetsuto Uesu's light novel (AniList id 79305, type NOVEL, 75 chapters across 13 volumes); the parallel manga adaptation (id 81755) is a separate, incomplete continuity (only 9 volumes / 46 chapters) that diverges from the anime, so this maps by LN volume instead. S1 adapts LN vols 1-2 and S2 BURST adapts LN vols 3-4, leaving vols 5-13 unadapted. Chapter ranges are proportional estimates converting those volume boundaries onto AniList's 75-chapter count, so they are approximate. The DEPARTURES OVA and other specials are side entries; there are no theatrical films.

mappings.arc: Master-Servant Pact (new step-sisters & family forms, LN vol 1)
Zolgia Arc (Mio kidnapped & rescued, Zest joins, LN vol 2)
Zest's Contract & the Hero Village summons Basara (LN vol 3)
